balanceOf(address,uint256).details: Returns the value of tokens of token type `id` owned by `account`.

balanceOfBatch(address[],uint256[]).details: See {IERC1155-balanceOfBatch}. Requirements: - `accounts` and `ids` must have the same length.

params.uri: Base metadata URI for the tokens

returns.totalVerifiers: Total number of verifiers (would need tracking)

getCommunityVerifiers(uint256,uint256,ui.details: This is a convenience function that may be expensive for large communities

returns.hasMore: True if there are more results beyond maxResults
returns.powers: Array of corresponding verifier power amounts

isApprovedForAll(address,address).details: Returns true if `operator` is approved to transfer ``account``'s tokens. See {setApprovalForAll}.

isConsumingScheduledOp().details: Returns true only in the context of a delayed restricted call, at the moment that the scheduled operation is being consumed. Prevents denial of service for delayed restricted calls in the case that the contract performs attacker controlled calls.

safeTransferFrom(address,address,uint256.details: All transfer functions revert to prevent trading of verifier power

setApprovalForAll(address,bool).details: Grants or revokes permission to `operator` to transfer the caller's tokens, according to `approved`, Emits an {ApprovalForAll} event. Requirements: - `operator` cannot be the zero address.

setAuthority(address).details: Transfers control to a new authority. The caller must be the current authority.

supportsInterface(bytes4).details: Returns true if this contract implements the interface defined by `interfaceId`. See the corresponding https://eips.ethereum.org/EIPS/eip-165#how-interfaces-are-identified[ERC section] to learn more about how these ids are created. This function call must use less than 30 000 gas.

uri(uint256).details: See {IERC1155MetadataURI-uri}. This implementation returns the same URI for *all* token types. It relies on the token type ID substitution mechanism https://eips.ethereum.org/EIPS/eip-1155#metadata[defined in the ERC]. Clients calling this function must replace the `\{id\}` substring with the actual token type ID.

adminTransfer(address,address,uint256,st.notice: Administrative transfer for this token's immutable community

batchBurn(address[],uint256[],string).notice: Batch burn verifier power for this token's immutable community

batchMint(address[],uint256[],string).notice: Batch mint verifier power for this token's immutable community

burn(address,uint256,string).notice: Burn verifier power for this token's immutable community

communityId().notice: Immutable community scope for this token instance.

getCommunityStats().notice: Get verifier power statistics for this token's immutable community

getCommunityVerifiers(uint256,uint256,ui.notice: Get all addresses with verifier power for a community (view only - gas intensive)

hasVerifierPower(address).notice: Check if address has verifier power in this token's immutable community

initializeCommunity(string).notice: Initialize this token's immutable community with metadata

mint(address,uint256,string).notice: Mint verifier power for this token's immutable community

safeBatchTransferFrom(address,address,ui.notice: Disable batch transfers - only AccessManager-authorized transfers allowed via adminTransfer

safeTransferFrom(address,address,uint256.notice: Disable regular transfers - only AccessManager-authorized transfers allowed via adminTransfer

setURI(string).notice: Update the base URI for token metadata
